first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the written evaluations are substantively the same. Both versions identify the same core strengths (full-stack engineering) and concerns (lack of specific GenAI production experience, vector databases, and cloud platforms). Minor variations in wording, such as the variant mentioning specific multi-agent frameworks, represent normal run-to-run noise and do not constitute a new or different critique based on the candidate's location.
